response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack development experience with a strong emphasis on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning well with the job's primary stack. His background in AI-agent infrastructure, enterprise tooling, and open-source contributions showcases technical depth and adaptability. While his experience spans multiple languages, his recent roles heavily feature the required technologies, and his leadership in workshops and talks highlights strong collaboration and communication skills.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (8+ years) with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Nest.js, matching the primary stack requirements.
Proven track record in AI-agent development and internal tooling, demonstrating alignment with enterprise automation needs.
Strong open-source contributions and leadership in technical workshops, indicating deep expertise and collaboration skills.
concerns: Breadth of experience across many languages (D, Java, Swift, etc.) may dilute focus on the job's core stack (TypeScript/Node/React).
Limited explicit mention of cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) or containerization (Kubernetes) in recent roles.
German language proficiency is basic, which may impact collaboration in a Berlin-based team.
